observed_failure.surface: SkillGuard current contract compilation for a maintained OpenSpec tasks.md file
observed_failure.prior_local_claim: progress checkbox state is evidence output and cannot refresh maintained source authority
observed_failure.observed_result: changing only one task from unchecked to checked made check-contract report stale generated authority

classification.owner: SkillGuard shared source and content-impact hashing
classification.error_signature: tasks.md checkbox-only progress mutation changes source_file_hash

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: OpenSpec receipt projection normalized task checkbox state, but the shared SkillGuard source_file_hash normalized only line endings
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: contract compiler regression had toggled a tasks.md checkbox while preserving its task text
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: all maintained-source fingerprints that consume tasks.md must preserve task text while normalizing only the Markdown checkbox state
root_cause_backpropagation.owner_code_contract: source_file_hash -> implementation fingerprint -> content-impact component -> compiled contract currentness

generalized_repair.rule: Normalize only leading Markdown list checkbox state in files named tasks.md before source hashing; keep every other byte of normalized task text authoritative.
generalized_repair.observed_regression: The installed SkillGuard accepted a real TraceGuard tasks.md [x] to [X] checkbox-only change with the exact unchanged contract hash 2F05A96EC0BEB85BCC1D8428436E26CC62E8CDC142BB450566A41F6B39C1C7C6.
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: Focused compiler and TestMesh suites passed checkbox, nested-task, fenced-example, task-text-change, source-manifest, and shared projection cases.
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: do not ignore task text, other Markdown content, code, contracts, tests, configuration, or any non-checkbox source change

required_revalidation: focused contract compiler checkbox and semantic-change regressions
transactional SkillGuard reinstall and installed currentness check
real TraceGuard checkbox-only contract currentness replay

revalidation_evidence.focused_regressions: 76 tests and 7 subtests passed before installation; the final focused shared-policy subset passed 12 tests after fenced-example hardening.
revalidation_evidence.flowguard_model: validation-composition model passed 19/19 positive gates and 7/7 known-bad gates.
revalidation_evidence.installation: transaction install install-de9c5d4df3984ca988be7da660d1efa1 passed stage parity, active parity, SkillGuard/router authority, self-check, check-skill, and runtime import smoke.
revalidation_evidence.real_target_replay: TraceGuard check-contract passed after a checkbox-only [x] to [X] mutation and preserved contract hash 2F05A96EC0BEB85BCC1D8428436E26CC62E8CDC142BB450566A41F6B39C1C7C6; the display state was restored afterward.

claim_boundary: The repair is validated for the current source and installed SkillGuard, the existing validation-composition model, focused compiler/TestMesh regressions, and a real TraceGuard checkbox-only currentness replay. It does not prove Guard-domain behavior, the pending five-family installation parent, release, publication, or future AI behavior.
